1. Hero Section: Clear headline with primary keyword (e.g., "Comprehensive Mental Health Services in Atlanta"). Strong CTA button (e.g., "Book an Appointment"). 2. Trust Badges/Logos: (If applicable) Logos of insurance accepted, affiliations. 3. Intro to GlobeCoRe: Brief, welcoming paragraph on your philosophy. 4. Core Services Overview: Icons/boxes linking to main service pages (Counseling, Evaluations, TMS, etc.). 5. Specialties/Areas We Treat: A selection of key specialties (Depression, Anxiety, Trauma, etc.) linking to specialty pages. 6. Meet the Team Teaser: Photos and links to a few key providers. 7. Why Choose Us?: Bullet points on unique value props. 8. FAQs Section 9. Testimonials/Reviews: Short, powerful quotes. 10. Final CTA: Reiterate contact info and a booking form/link. 11. Footer: All links, contact info, copyright.
Primary Goal: Conversion and clear navigation. SEO: Use primary keyword in H1 and first paragraph. Internal links to key service and specialty pages.

1. Hero Section: Page title as H1 (e.g., "Counseling Services in Atlanta"). 2. Introduction: 1-2 paragraphs defining the service and its benefits, naturally using primary and secondary keywords. 3. "What to Expect" / "Our Approach": Describe the process, modalities used (CBT, etc.). Builds trust and reduces anxiety. 4. Types/Conditions Treated: Bulleted list (e.g., for Counseling: Individual, Couples, Family). Link to relevant specialty pages. 5. Meet the Team (relevant providers): Show photos and bios of therapists who offer this service. 6. Pricing / Insurance Info: Brief overview with link to full pricing page. 7. FAQ Section: Answer common questions about this specific service. 8. Strong CTA: "Book Your Initial Consultation" form or button.

Primary Goal: Convert users searching for a specific service. SEO: Target [Service] Atlanta GA. Use schema markup (e.g., MedicalService) if possible. Include internal links to related specialties and team members.

1. Hero Section: Page title as H1 (e.g., "Trauma Therapy & PTSD Treatment in Atlanta"). 2. In-depth Educational Content: 300-500+ words explaining the condition (e.g., trauma, its symptoms, impact). Show expertise and empathy. 3. Treatment Approaches: Detail how GlobeCoRe treats this specific issue (e.g., "We use EMDR, Trauma-Focused CBT..."). This is key for differentiation. 4. Related Services: Link to relevant service pages (e.g., on a Trauma page, link to "Counseling" and "Medication Management"). 5. Meet the Team (specialists): Show therapists with expertise in this area. 6. Success Story/Testimonial: (Anonymous and ethical) example of progress. 7. Resources: Links to relevant blog posts or external resources. 8. CTA: "Get Help for [Condition]" with a link to contact or book.

Primary Goal: Demonstrate deep authority on a specific topic and capture niche search traffic. SEO: Target long-tail keywords like [Condition] therapy Atlanta GA. This is a cornerstone of topical authority. The in-depth content is crucial.

1. Hero Section: Page title as H1 (e.g., "Therapy in Marietta, GA – Serving Cobb County"). 2. Local Introduction: "GlobeCoRe is proud to offer comprehensive mental health services to the residents of Marietta and the surrounding Cobb County area." 3. Why Choose Us for Marietta Residents?: Highlight convenience (e.g., easy access from I-75), telehealth options, and understanding of local community needs. 4. Services Available in this Area: List all core services (Counseling, TMS, etc.) – as they are all available via telehealth or at the Atlanta office. 5. Key Specialties: List relevant specialties that are in high demand. 6. Local Info/Landmarks: Briefly mention proximity to major employers, schools, or communities (e.g., "serving families near Marietta High School"). 7. Simple CTA: "Contact our Marietta-area therapists today." Include phone and contact form.

Primary Goal: Rank for [City] GA searches and build local relevance. SEO: Content should be unique for each city. Embed a Google Map showing the location relative to the main office. Use local schema markup (LocalBusiness) with the main Atlanta address but mention the areas served.

1. Title: Engaging, keyword-rich H1. 2. Byline/Date: Author name and publication date (boosts E-E-A-T). 3. Introduction: Hook the reader and state what the post will cover. 4. Subheadings (H2, H3): Break up text for readability and SEO. 5. Body Content: High-quality, original, helpful information. Aim for 1000+ words for pillar posts. 6. Internal Links: Link to relevant service, specialty, or team pages throughout. 7. Visuals: Images, infographics, or videos. 8. Conclusion/Summary: Reiterate key takeaways. 9. CTA: "If you're struggling with [topic], our team is here to help. [Link to contact page]."
Primary Goal: Attract top-of-funnel traffic, answer user questions, and build backlinks. SEO: Target informational keywords. Link internally to your money pages (services/specialties).

1. Hero Section: "About GlobeCoRe: Atlanta's Premier Mental Health Practice" 2. Our Story: Founding narrative, mission, vision. 3. Our Philosophy/Approach: Expand on core values (holistic, client-centered). 4. Meet the Team (Overview): Link to full team page with photos. 5. Why Choose Us: Differentiators (experience, specialties, approach). 6. Community Involvement: Local partnerships, events. 7. Final CTA: "Ready to start your journey? Contact us today."
Primary Goal: Build trust and authority (E-E-A-T). SEO: Target about [practice name] Atlanta GA. Include bios and credentials.

1. Hero Section: "Contact GlobeCoRe Mental Health Services" 2. Contact Form: Name, email, phone, brief message, interest area (dropdown). 3. Phone Number: Prominently displayed. 4. Email Address: For general inquiries. 5. Office Location: Address with embedded Google Map. 6. Office Hours: Days and times available. 7. Insurance Inquiries: Brief info with link to pricing page. 8. Crisis Resources: If in crisis, provide emergency contact info.
Primary Goal: Lead generation. SEO: Target contact therapist Atlanta GA. Ensure NAP (Name, Address, Phone) consistency for local SEO.
